description_long: This is a double-basin bathroom vanity unit featuring two white, oval vessel sinks mounted on a rectangular wooden cabinet. The cabinet is finished in a light wood grain and includes two wide drawers beneath the sinks, providing ample storage space. Each sink is equipped with a modern, single-lever faucet positioned at the rear of the basin. The rear view reveals plumbing fixtures and mounting hardware, indicating wall attachment. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, suitable for upscale urban bathrooms or public washrooms. The surfaces are smooth and the color contrast between the white ceramic basins and the warm wood cabinetry creates a visually appealing centerpiece.
description: A modern double-basin vessel sink set on a light wood cabinet with drawers and sleek faucets, ideal for urban bathrooms.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the wooden cabinet and the profile of the two white vessel sinks.
description_view_1: Front view displaying both oval sinks, the full width of the cabinet, and the drawer fronts.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, highlighting the cabinet's depth and sink profiles.
description_view_3: Rear view exposing the plumbing, mounting hardware, and the back of the cabinet structure.
attribute_drain_location: left basin: center, right basin: center
